canonical_filename.mechanism: SKILL.md (fixed filename per Agent Skills open standard)

custom_filename.mechanism: not observed — Agent Skills standard uses fixed SKILL.md filename

description.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: description (required per Agent Skills open standard)

display_name.mechanism: yaml frontmatter key: name (required per Agent Skills open standard)

global_scope.mechanism: skill directory under ~/.copilot/skills/<name>/ or ~/.agents/skills/<name>/ in the user home directory

project_scope.mechanism: skill directory under .github/skills/<name>/, .claude/skills/<name>/, or .agents/skills/<name>/ in project repository

shared_scope.mechanism: organization-level and enterprise-level skills explicitly stated as 'coming soon' in source

user_invocable.mechanism: slash-prefixed skill name in user prompt (e.g. /frontend-design)

providerExtensions.name: Supporting Files
providerExtensions.summary: Skills are folders that bundle SKILL.md plus additional scripts, resources, and instruction files as a unit of loading.

providerExtensions.name: Description-Based Auto-Invocation
providerExtensions.summary: Copilot auto-loads skills based on description relevance to the current task, in addition to explicit /skill-name invocation.

providerExtensions.name: Plugin Scope
providerExtensions.summary: Skills bundled via plugins occupy a separate management namespace and must be managed through the plugin, not /skills remove.

providerExtensions.name: Per-Skill Enable/Disable Toggle
providerExtensions.summary: The /skills command (with no subcommand) opens an interactive toggle UI — up/down keys navigate and space bar enables or disables individual skills without removing them.

providerExtensions.name: CLI Skill Management Commands
providerExtensions.summary: The /skills slash-command suite (list, info, add, reload, remove) provides runtime skill management without restart; /skills remove works only for directly-added skills, not plugin-bundled skills.
